description: ImportError caused by renaming a CUDA attention kernel package

ground_truth.root_cause: attention.py was updated to import FlashAttentionKernel from 'nvidia_attention', but this package/symbol does not exist. The previous import 'nvidia_flash_attention.FlashAttention' was correct.
ground_truth.recommended_fix: Revert the import in src/models/attention.py to 'from nvidia_flash_attention import FlashAttention', or install the correct package and update the symbol name.
